485:   // Load published pooja products from Supabase and merge with static mock products
486:   const loadPublishedProducts = async () => {
487:     try {
488:       const { data, error } = await supabase
489:         .from('website_pooja_products')
490:         .select('*')
491:         .eq('is_published', true)
492:         .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
493: 
494:       if (error) throw error;
495:       if (data) {
496:         const mappedData: Product[] = data.map((item: any) => ({
497:           id: item.id,
498:           name: item.name,
499:           description: item.description,
500:           price: typeof item.price === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.price) : item.price,
501:           originalPrice: item.original_price ? (typeof item.original_price === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.original_price) : item.original_price) : undefined,
502:           rating: typeof item.rating === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.rating) : (item.rating || 5.0),
503:           reviewsCount: item.reviews_count || 0,
504:           image: item.image || '📿',
505:           category: item.category,
506:           inStock: item.in_stock ?? true,
507:           benefits: item.benefits || [],
508:           popularity: item.popularity || 80,
509:           spiritualType: item.spiritual_type || 'Rituals',
510:           // custom fields to keep compatibility with PoojaProduct:
511:           sanskritName: item.sanskrit_name,
512:           shortName: item.short_name,
513:           slug: item.slug,
514:           subtitle: item.subtitle,
515:           shortDescription: item.short_description,
516:           spiritualSignificance: item.spiritual_significance,
517:           material: item.material,
518:           weight: item.weight,
519:           dimensions: item.dimensions,
520:           origin: item.origin,
